name: Sanae Kochiya
_design_notes: Mountain of Faith (TH10) Stage 5 roster from Touhou Wiki / sanae_spellcards.pdf: midboss Esoterica "Gray Thaumaturgy", then Miracle "Daytime Guest Stars", Sea Opening "The Day the Sea Split", Preparation "Star Ritual to Call the Godly Winds", Miracle "God's Wind".
Nonspells between spellcards follow Touhou pacing; patterns use existing PatternStep types (LASER_ROTATING pentagram = 5 spokes).

introDialog.speaker: BOSS
introDialog.text: The wind from Moriya carries my miracle. If you still stand here, face it with everything you have!

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Hakurei shrine maiden? Then you know faith is won in the sky, not on paper.

reimu.speaker: PLAYER
reimu.text: I'll settle this incident whether your god helps or not.

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Good. Show me that resolve in your dodging!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: A magician from the forest? Don't expect miracles to wait politely in line.

marisa.speaker: PLAYER
marisa.text: Miracles, stars, whatever — I'll graze through and steal the win, ze!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Then keep up with the wind until the last spell breaks!

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Scarlet Devil Mansion's maid, all the way up the mountain? You must be serious.

sakuya.speaker: PLAYER
sakuya.text: Time is on my side — I'll clear your patterns all the same.

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Then let the gale test whether your clocks can keep their tick.

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Another me? Fine — let's see which faith the mountain answers!

sanae.speaker: PLAYER
sanae.text: I'll prove I'm not just a copy!

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Words won't decide it. The danmaku will.

cirno.speaker: BOSS
cirno.text: A fairy climbed this high? Either brave or very lost.

cirno.speaker: PLAYER
cirno.text: I'm the strongest! Your wind can't blow that away!

cirno.speaker: BOSS
cirno.text: We'll see if ice can anchor you when the gale hits.

victoryDialog: Amazing... even Kanako would call that a worthy miracle.
defeatDialog: Faith needs practice too. Come back when you're ready.

victoryDialogByCharacter.reimu: The Hakurei shine even outside your shrine. Respect.
victoryDialogByCharacter.marisa: You really did bulldoze through — just try not to blow up the shrine, ze.
victoryDialogByCharacter.sakuya: Precision and nerve — Lady Remilia would notice that composure.
victoryDialogByCharacter.sanae: So I can lose to myself... guess I need more training.
victoryDialogByCharacter.cirno: Strongest fairy after all? I'll remember that chill.

defeatDialogByCharacter.reimu: Your feet hesitated before your faith did.
defeatDialogByCharacter.marisa: Too greedy on the spark, not enough on the wind.
defeatDialogByCharacter.sakuya: Even perfect timing slips in a gale.
defeatDialogByCharacter.cirno: The strongest title needs more than bravado.

phases._note: Nonspell 1 — mountain green/blue pressure + light rings.
Midboss spell card — Esoterica "Gray Thaumaturgy" (muted orb/lattice feel).
Miracle "Daytime Guest Stars" — bright comet streams + star rings.
Nonspell 3 — crossing rice + spiral lane checks.
Sea Opening "The Day the Sea Split" — wide beams + curtain pressure (split-lane read).
phases.spellName: Sea Opening "The Day the Sea Split"

phases._note: Preparation "Star Ritual to Call the Godly Winds" — pentagram laser spokes + orb lane.
phases.spellName: Preparation "Star Ritual to Call the Godly Winds"

phases._note: Miracle "God's Wind" — finale: spirals, bounce bursts, dense curtains.
